name: Aisha Khan
bio: Studied engineering at BUET. Now works at a software company in Dhaka. We used to grab tea at TSC regularly.

name: Md Raihan Ahmed
bio: Grew up together in Sylhet. Passionate about cricket and photography. Recently moved to Chittagong.

name: Fatima Begum
bio: Talented graphic designer from Uttara. We met at a creative workshop and collaborate on side projects. Loves Bengali culture.

name: Karim Hassan
bio: Co-founder of a fintech startup. Met at an entrepreneurship event in Gulshan. We grab lunch at Star Kabab often.

name: Nadia Islam
bio: Currently doing her residency in orthopedics at a Dhaka hospital. We promised to catch up but life got busy.

name: Sabbir Rahman
bio: Independent filmmaker based in Mirpur. We met at the Dhaka International Film Festival. His short films are amazing.

name: Rina Chakraborty
bio: English teacher now at a private school in Dhanmondi. We debated together in high school. Still passionate about literature.

name: Tariq Abdullah
bio: Travel blogger exploring Bangladesh. We've hiked in Lawachora and Srimangal together. Always planning the next trek.

name: Priya Dutta
bio: Co-founder of a women-led e-commerce platform. Mentors young entrepreneurs through local programs. Coffee enthusiast from Mohakhali.

name: Shuvo Roy
bio: Talented guitarist and music producer. We used to jam together at the rehearsal space in Bashundhara. He's scoring films now.
